name: Fujisoft Service Bureau Incorporated
summary: Fujisoft Service Bureau Incorporated provides business process outsourcing services in Japan. It also offers office support services, such as temporary staffing, strategic team dispatch, referral scheduled dispatch, and recruitment services; and contact center and web content and system support services. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Fujisoft Service Bureau Incorporated is a subsidiary of Fuji Soft Incorporated.
